name_romaji: Shihon Chakushoku Shaka Hassō no Zu
name_en: Painting of the Eight Phases of the Buddha's Life, Color on Paper
description_en: A folk cultural property (tangible: a color-on-paper painting of the eight phases of the Buddha's life). Municipally designated by Sano City on 1961-05-27. Located at 2229 Tenmyo-cho, Sano City.
